description: Schema for bankruptcy and legal case record tracking, optimized for LLM retrieval.

columns.name: account_number
columns.description: Unique account identifier associated with the debtor. Use this field to locate all bankruptcy records, legal notices, status changes, and case activity related to a specific financial account.

columns.name: client_name
columns.description: Name or code of the creditor, lender, institution, or client that owns or services the account involved in the bankruptcy case. Examples include VP, SYF, etc. Commonly used for client-level reporting and analysis. Map user terms 'client', 'VP', 'client code' to this column.

columns.name: open_date
columns.description: Date when the bankruptcy monitoring record or account tracking entry was first created in the system. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: First name of the account holder or debtor. Used for identity matching and debtor lookup.

columns.name: middle_name
columns.description: Middle name of the account holder or debtor.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Last name (surname) of the account holder or debtor.

columns.name: ssn
columns.description: Social Security Number of the account holder. Used for identity verification and matching.

columns.name: address_line_1
columns.description: Primary street address line 1 of the account holder.

columns.name: address_line_2
columns.description: Secondary address line 2 of the account holder (e.g., apartment, suite number).

columns.name: city
columns.description: City of residence for the account holder or debtor.

columns.name: state
columns.description: U.S. state abbreviation where the debtor resides or where the case was filed. Used for geographic filtering and analysis.

columns.name: zipcode
columns.description: Postal ZIP code for the account holder's address.

columns.name: record_type
columns.description: Lifecycle state of the bankruptcy record. Typical values include New, Update, Reopened, or Closed. Useful for identifying newly received filings, updates, or completed cases.

columns.name: match_code
columns.description: Code describing how the bankruptcy record was matched to the account or consumer. Values include P1, P2, P3 (primary matches) and M1, M2, M3 (manual matches). May represent matching based on SSN, name, address, or a combination of identifying attributes.

columns.name: match_score
columns.description: Numeric confidence score indicating how accurately the bankruptcy filing matches the consumer or account. Higher values indicate stronger matching confidence.

columns.name: consumer_id
columns.description: Unique identifier assigned to the consumer or debtor in the system.

columns.name: consumer_type
columns.description: Classification of the debtor or consumer associated with the bankruptcy filing. Examples include Individual, Business, Corporate, Partnership, Trust, or SME.

columns.name: notification_number
columns.description: Unique notification identifier for the bankruptcy notice or alert issued.

columns.name: notice_type
columns.description: Type of bankruptcy notice, court filing, or legal notification received. Examples include bankruptcy filing notices, discharge notices, dismissal notices, conversion notices, or creditor meeting notices.

columns.name: case_number
columns.description: Official bankruptcy court case number used to uniquely identify the legal proceeding. Multiple notices and events may be associated with the same case number.

columns.name: chapter
columns.description: Current bankruptcy chapter under which the case is proceeding. Common values include 7 (liquidation), 11 (reorganization), and 13 (individual repayment plan).

columns.name: original_chapter
columns.description: Initial bankruptcy chapter under which the case was originally filed before any court-approved conversion to another chapter.

columns.name: date_filed
columns.description: Date when the bankruptcy petition was officially filed with the court. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Use this column for yearly/annual/monthly trend analysis using strftime('%Y', date_filed).

columns.name: conversion_date
columns.description: Date on which the bankruptcy case was converted from one chapter to another. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Current legal status of the bankruptcy case. Common values include Active, Pending, Converted, Discharged, Dismissed, or Closed.

columns.name: status_date
columns.description: Date on which the current case status became effective or was officially recorded by the court.

columns.name: pd_ssn
columns.description: Social Security Number of the primary debtor (PD).

columns.name: pd_first_name
columns.description: First name of the primary debtor (PD).

columns.name: pd_middle_name
columns.description: Middle name of the primary debtor (PD).

columns.name: pd_last_name
columns.description: Last name (surname) of the primary debtor (PD).

columns.name: pd_suffix
columns.description: Name suffix of the primary debtor (e.g., Jr., Sr., III).

columns.name: pd_aka
columns.description: Alternate name (Also Known As) used by the primary debtor. Useful when matching bankruptcy records filed under different names or aliases.

columns.name: pd_aka2
columns.description: Second alternate name (Also Known As) for the primary debtor.

columns.name: pd_dba
columns.description: Business name (Doing Business As) associated with the primary debtor. Commonly used when an individual or entity operates under a trade name.

columns.name: pd_dba2
columns.description: Second business name (Doing Business As) associated with the primary debtor.

columns.name: pd_address_line_1
columns.description: Primary address line 1 for the primary debtor.

columns.name: pd_address_line_2
columns.description: Secondary address line 2 for the primary debtor.

columns.name: pd_city
columns.description: City of residence for the primary debtor.

columns.name: pd_state
columns.description: State of residence for the primary debtor.

columns.name: pd_zipcode
columns.description: ZIP code for the primary debtor's address.

columns.name: pd_phone
columns.description: Phone number for the primary debtor.

columns.name: sd_ssn
columns.description: Social Security Number of the secondary debtor (SD).

columns.name: sd_first_name
columns.description: First name of the secondary debtor (SD).

columns.name: sd_middle_name
columns.description: Middle name of the secondary debtor (SD).

columns.name: sd_last_name
columns.description: Last name (surname) of the secondary debtor (SD).

columns.name: sd_suffix
columns.description: Name suffix of the secondary debtor (e.g., Jr., Sr.).

columns.name: sd_aka
columns.description: Alternate name (Also Known As) for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: sd_aka2
columns.description: Second alternate name (Also Known As) for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: sd_dba
columns.description: Business name (Doing Business As) for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: sd_dba2
columns.description: Second business name (Doing Business As) for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: sd_address_line_1
columns.description: Primary address line 1 for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: sd_address_line_2
columns.description: Secondary address line 2 for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: sd_city
columns.description: City of residence for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: sd_state
columns.description: State of residence for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: sd_zipcode
columns.description: ZIP code for the secondary debtor's address.

columns.name: sd_phone
columns.description: Phone number for the secondary debtor.

columns.name: judge_name
columns.description: Name of the bankruptcy judge assigned to oversee and make rulings in the case.

columns.name: prose_indicator
columns.description: Indicates whether the debtor is self-represented without legal counsel. True = debtor is representing themselves (pro se); False = represented by an attorney.

columns.name: attorney_ssn
columns.description: SSN or identification number of the attorney representing the debtor.

columns.name: attorney_first_name
columns.description: First name of the attorney representing the debtor.

columns.name: attorney_middle_name
columns.description: Middle name of the attorney representing the debtor.

columns.name: attorney_last_name
columns.description: Last name of the attorney representing the debtor.

columns.name: attorney_suffix
columns.description: Name suffix of the attorney (e.g., Jr., Esq.).

columns.name: attorney_aka
columns.description: Alternate name (Also Known As) for the attorney.

columns.name: attorney_aka2
columns.description: Second alternate name for the attorney.

columns.name: attorney_dba
columns.description: Firm or business name (Doing Business As) used by the attorney or law firm representing the debtor. Use for attorney/lawyer grouping and analysis.

columns.name: attorney_dba2
columns.description: Second firm name (Doing Business As) for the attorney.

columns.name: attorney_address_line_1
columns.description: Primary address line 1 for the attorney's office.

columns.name: attorney_address_line_2
columns.description: Secondary address line 2 for the attorney's office.

columns.name: attorney_city
columns.description: City where the attorney's office is located.

columns.name: attorney_state
columns.description: State where the attorney's office is located.

columns.name: attorney_zipcode
columns.description: ZIP code of the attorney's office address.

columns.name: attorney_phone
columns.description: Phone number for the attorney's office.

columns.name: creditor_meeting_time
columns.description: Scheduled date and/or time for the Section 341 Meeting of Creditors, where the debtor is questioned under oath regarding financial affairs and bankruptcy filings.

columns.name: creditor_address_line_1
columns.description: Primary address line 1 for the creditor or meeting location.

columns.name: creditor_address_line_2
columns.description: Secondary address line 2 for the creditor or meeting location.

columns.name: creditor_city
columns.description: City for the creditor's address or meeting location.

columns.name: creditor_state
columns.description: State for the creditor's address or meeting location.

columns.name: creditor_zipcode
columns.description: ZIP code for the creditor's address.

columns.name: creditor_phone
columns.description: Phone number for the creditor.

columns.name: trustee_name
columns.description: Name of the trustee appointed by the bankruptcy court to administer the case, review assets, and oversee compliance with bankruptcy procedures.

columns.name: trustee_address_line_1
columns.description: Primary address line 1 for the trustee's office.

columns.name: trustee_address_line_2
columns.description: Secondary address line 2 for the trustee's office.

columns.name: trustee_city
columns.description: City where the trustee's office is located.

columns.name: trustee_state
columns.description: State where the trustee's office is located.

columns.name: trustee_zipcode
columns.description: ZIP code of the trustee's office.

columns.name: trustee_phone
columns.description: Phone number for the trustee's office.

columns.name: court_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the bankruptcy court responsible for handling the case.

columns.name: court_district
columns.description: Federal judicial district or court jurisdiction where the bankruptcy case was filed and is being administered.

columns.name: court_address_line_1
columns.description: Primary address line 1 for the bankruptcy court.

columns.name: court_address_line_2
columns.description: Secondary address line 2 for the bankruptcy court.

columns.name: court_city
columns.description: City where the bankruptcy court is located.

columns.name: court_state
columns.description: State where the bankruptcy court is located.

columns.name: court_zipcode
columns.description: ZIP code of the bankruptcy court address.

columns.name: court_phone
columns.description: Phone number for the bankruptcy court.

columns.name: confirmation_date
columns.description: Date on which the bankruptcy repayment or reorganization plan was officially confirmed and approved by the court.

columns.name: asset_indicator
columns.description: Indicates whether the bankruptcy case involves reportable assets available for liquidation or distribution to creditors. True = asset case; False = no-asset case.

columns.name: before_open
columns.description: Indicator or date value representing activity or status before the account was formally opened or monitored.

columns.name: sasf
columns.description: SASF indicator or code associated with the bankruptcy record.

columns.name: active_status
columns.description: Operational indicator showing whether the bankruptcy record is currently active, inactive, suspended, or otherwise available for processing.

columns.name: disposition_text
columns.description: Narrative description of the final outcome, ruling, resolution, or disposition of the bankruptcy case.

columns.name: poc_bar_date
columns.description: Deadline by which creditors must file a Proof of Claim (POC) with the bankruptcy court to participate in distributions from the bankruptcy estate.
